# [How to Fight Fake Reviews in 2025: Proven Tactics from Experts](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ayVie0hnAAs)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [Sterling Sky Inc](https://www.youtube.com/@SterlingSkyInc)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-07-16
**Published at**: 2025-07-16
**Length**: 1:01:51
**Views**: 1216
**Likes**: 39
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
Show Links:
1. Google Reporting Tool
https://support.google.com/business/answer/4596773?hl=en
2. Review Gating Widget
https://publicwww.com/
3. Google’s transparency report
https://transparencyreport.google.com/maps-content/enforcement

Date & Time: July 16, 2025 - 12:00 PM ET
Duration: 1 Hours
Speaker: Curtis Boyd & Joy Hawkins
Webinar Sponsor: GatherUp

245 million fake reviews!

That’s how many Google deleted last year—a 44% spike from the year before. The fake review problem is growing faster than most business owners realize, and it's putting reputations, revenue, and even livelihoods on the line.
In this eye-opening webinar, Joy sits down with Curtis Boyd, one of the most respected voices in online reputation management, to unpack:

-How fake reviews are created and spread
-What Google (and other platforms) are doing to stop them
-The shocking truth about “review jail” and hidden review blocks
-And the real-world tactics you can use to defend your business today

You’ll also see live audits of fake reviews, learn how to spot them before your customers do, and walk away with a clear strategy to build authentic, positive reviews that actually stick.
Whether you're a small business owner, marketing professional, or just curious about how review platforms are being gamed—this session is for you.

Don’t let your reputation be controlled by fake reviews. Learn how to fight back.

▬ Chapters ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
0:00:00 - Intro
0:00:23 - The Prevalence of Fake Reviews

0:31:52 - Identifying Competitors Buying Reviews
```

# Nytro SEO Review’s and Clients Testimonials

Mindblowing Tool

Don't sleep on this mind-blowing tool. It auto-optimizes SEO and is considerate of you as a business owner who may not have the time or the mind space to do this.
The tool serves as a much-needed virtual assistant that goes above and beyond. I recently had an onboarding session with the founder and a team member, and it was mind-blowing. So, I just want to emphasize – don't sleep on this tool. It's a must-have and a no-brainer.
If you're unsure how to use the tool, I suggest watching the videos or booking an onboarding call. It will blow your mind. That's a no-brainer.

Brilliant product! Highly recommended. Get it while it's still available. I had my onboarding call with Shawn today and he demo'ed the system to me professionally and very patiently as I had a few minor issues with the product which were expertly answered. Very powerful SEO software once you get familiar with the dashboard. 5 Tacos all the way! Not to be missed.

Great customer support

I just completed my onboarding session, initially set for 30 minutes but extended to over an hour. I am thoroughly impressed with Nytro SEO, especially when compared to other tools on AppSumo. This software stands out for its maturity and its dedicated focus on optimizing titles and meta tags, rather than attempting to tackle various on-page SEO tasks that can degrade the overall visual appeal of the pages. If you are in search of a well-established tool with an exciting roadmap for future enhancements, I highly recommend Nytro SEO.

SEO Automation, Supercharged by AI

Nytro SEO stands out for its automation features, making SEO management effortless. The app automates keyword tracking, site audits, and keyword suggestions, saving users valuable time. With Nytro SEO, improving your website’s rankings becomes an easier experience—ideal for anyone seeking automated SEO solutions. I highly recommend this tool.

Great team that cares about our success

We have had Nytro SEO since its first campaign, but we had a few issues getting keywords selected correctly for our content so we have been holding off.
But I feel the Nytro SEO team deserves some compliments now before we update the review with our results.
The Nytro SEO teams has carefully reviewed why our desired keywords aren't being recognized for its promotion. It ended up being our wrong keyword strategy causing generic terms being heavily matched while long form keywords become less apprent in the eyes of AI. And the Nytro SEO team got on a second call with us to patiently go through the various system features not only to narrow down our issue but also to generate better content.
This demonstrates1. how detailed the system is to analyze our content2. how we got wrong with our keyword selection (suggested by another SEO platform)3. how thoughtful Nytro SEO is, knowing what we need to know to isolate problems4. how Nytro SEO really knows how to make our SEO successful
Our content comes from field experts who aren't familiar with SEO, so we need to implement a few things to achieve SEO. But I believe Nytro SEO is powerful enough to get us there.
Nytro SEO doesn't just automate the meta tags, it has a very comprehensive system that helps to identify why the content doesn't match the keyword strategy so you know how to take actions.
Last but not least, if you are really lost, just ask the team for help.

Great tool! Would love to see them back on Appsumo so I can upgrade.

Nytro SEO has been a fantastic tool for improving my website’s search engine rankings. After getting set up, I noticed noticeable keyword rank increases, which has significantly boosted my site's visibility. It’s definitely worth the investment if you’re serious about SEO. I appreciate how user-friendly the platform is and how effective the keyword optimization features are. I’m even realizing that I want to optimize for more keywords than I initially thought possible with Nytro SEO. I would love to see them return to AppSumo so I can upgrade and unlock even more features! Overall, a great tool that delivers real results.

Comprehensive SEO and Great product

What truly sets them apart is their customer support. The onboarding call was fantastic—it guided me through every step of the process, making everything clear and simple, even for a beginner like me.

Comprehensive SEO suite with great support

The Nytro AppSumo page should advertise that the app comes with a complimentary live setup session. Shawn was great at showing how to navigate the app and providing excellent advice. I'm now looking forward to seeing some good results. So far, I'm delighted with Nytro.

Powerful SEO tool with really smart automation

This is a unique and powerful tool for enhancing the SEO of your or your clients’ websites. I was skeptical that a javascript-based tool could work to change the metatags and descriptions that are picked up by Google. But after trying it, I can say it absolutely works, and the changes NytroSEO made to my site’s meta tags have improved my ranking for important keywords on my site. It also introduced me to new keywords I could target with my existing content, and once I had it properly configured, it automatically updated meta tags on that old content to target these new keywords.
Looking at the specific pros and cons:
Pros It’s very simple to install on your website. It doesn’t matter what type of site you have. You just need to include the javascript tag on it, or possibly in Google Tag Manager, and it will work. T Since it’s JS-based, you don’t have to edit the site directly to change the tags. This is great if you’re working on client websites. For example, if you have someone working on SEO who isn’t an expert in the CMS, it’s not a problem. They never need to touch the CMS. The changes that the system implements are very smart. It uses your content plus data from Google about high-value keywords to figure out the best keywords your content could rank for and changes the meta tags to target those keywords. The keywords it picks are ones that are already represented within your content, though you may not have been specifically targeting them when you wrote the title and description. So, Google will still see a thematic match between those keywords and your content, but now it may rank you higher on more popular keywords you didn’t previously target. It can do this mostly automatically, though you have the option to override anything the system suggests. You have a lot of flexibility to specify how the system determines key content on your pages. It of course looks at your existing meta tags, and your H1 tag, but you can also tell it to look for different header level tags, and even give it XPaths if you have important content in another place on the page. This works best if you have pages that have a repeating template or format. The support is great. The founder reached out to me and he did a long live session with me, during which he showed me everything I needed to do to get my website set up correctly. It was fantastic, and you absolutely should take advantage of this if it’s offered to you.
Cons: The user interface is pretty unintuitive. It can be hard to find all pages where you set various settings. This isn’t a problem once you learn what to do, but initially, you may not even realize the options you have available. It makes the onboarding call really important. You need to see someone do the setup who understands it first. Just poking around the tool yourself is not very effective. It’s a JS app that runs live in the browser, and you can’t open things in a new tab, so I find it a little tedious when I need to edit many pages manually. A lot of back and forth and reloading the listing page. However, after learning the tool better, I now know that most of the manual editing I was doing probably wasn’t needed, so maybe this isn’t a huge deal. The page limits might be low depending your website. I realize this is a lifetime deal, so we can’t have everything. I have a Tier 5 and it’s got 20k pages. Most of my clients only have a couple hundred pages, so it’s fine. But, I have one client who would benefit from this tool who has 60k pages on their site. We’ll have to skip most of the pages if we use NytroSEO on it. You can buy a monthly subscription to more pages, but it’s $11 / month per 1k pages. So, it would be over $600/month to add this website in full to the system. Again, I realize this is a lifetime deal, and generally it’s very generous, so I don’t see this as a huge problem.
All told, I’m super impressed with this tool, and I can’t wait to use it on some client websites to see more results!

**Powerful SEO tool with really smart automation**

This is a unique and powerful tool for enhancing the SEO of your or your clients’ websites. I was skeptical that a javascript-based tool could work to change the metatags and descriptions that are picked up by Google. But after trying it, I can say it absolutely works, and the changes NytroSEO made to my site’s meta tags have improved my ranking for important keywords on my site. It also introduced me to new keywords I could target with my existing content, and once I had it properly configured, it automatically updated meta tags on that old content to target these new keywords.

Looking at the specific pros and cons:

Pros

\\* It’s very simple to install on your website. It doesn’t matter what type of site you have. You just need to include the javascript tag on it, or possibly in Google Tag Manager, and it will work. T

\\* Since it’s JS-based, you don’t have to edit the site directly to change the tags. This is great if you’re working on client websites. For example, if you have someone working on SEO who isn’t an expert in the CMS, it’s not a problem. They never need to touch the CMS.

\\* The changes that the system implements are very smart. It uses your content plus data from Google about high-value keywords to figure out the best keywords your content could rank for and changes the meta tags to target those keywords. The keywords it picks are ones that are already represented within your content, though you may not have been specifically targeting them when you wrote the title and description. So, Google will still see a thematic match between those keywords and your content, but now it may rank you higher on more popular keywords you didn’t previously target. It can do this mostly automatically, though you have the option to override anything the system suggests.

\\* You have a lot of flexibility to specify how the system determines key content on your pages. It of course looks at your existing meta tags, and your H1 tag, but you can also tell it to look for different header level tags, and even give it XPaths if you have important content in another place on the page. This works best if you have pages that have a repeating template or format.

\\* The support is great. The founder reached out to me and he did a long live session with me, during which he showed me everything I needed to do to get my website set up correctly. It was fantastic, and you absolutely should take advantage of this if it’s offered to you.

Cons:

\\* The user interface is pretty unintuitive. It can be hard to find all pages where you set various settings. This isn’t a problem once you learn what to do, but initially, you may not even realize the options you have available. It makes the onboarding call really important. You need to see someone do the setup who understands it first. Just poking around the tool yourself is not very effective.

\\* It’s a JS app that runs live in the browser, and you can’t open things in a new tab, so I find it a little tedious when I need to edit many pages manually. A lot of back and forth and reloading the listing page. However, after learning the tool better, I now know that most of the manual editing I was doing probably wasn’t needed, so maybe this isn’t a huge deal.

\\* The page limits might be low depending your website. I realize this is a lifetime deal, so we can’t have everything. I have a Tier 5 and it’s got 20k pages. Most of my clients only have a couple hundred pages, so it’s fine. But, I have one client who would benefit from this tool who has 60k pages on their site. We’ll have to skip most of the pages if we use NytroSEO on it. You can buy a monthly subscription to more pages, but it’s $11 / month per 1k pages. So, it would be over $600/month to add this website in full to the system. Again, I realize this is a lifetime deal, and generally it’s very generous, so I don’t see this as a huge problem.

All told, I’m super impressed with this tool, and I can’t wait to use it on some client websites to see more results!
